name: From Geneva: Aiguille du Midi and skiing in Chamonix Mont-Blanc
description: Discover From Geneva: Aiguille du Midi and skiing in Chamonix Mont-Blanc in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Geneva: Aiguille du Midi and skiing in Chamonix Mont-Blanc in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
